name: "I could've saved one more person..." | Sofia Manumit
description: In a makeshift camp placed in the surrounding dunes of Christipoli, both friends and foes rested beside one another, the reasoning? Their injuries were to severe for them to hold hatred against one another. Yet one person still held hatred, but it was directed at none but herself, Sofia Manumit, a field-medic who wished she could've saved just one more life.
creator: Captain Ahab the Whaler!
